scientific_question: Can eight complementary A413 Readers selected only from A401 leave-one-out ranks form a target-independent parallel W50 portfolio that transfers across thirty-two fresh A412 keys and beats the complete eight-view Direct12 portfolio at equal worker count?

algebraic_bridge.identity: the two scores differ only by the prototype variance, a cell-independent constant
algebraic_bridge.consequence: candidate 123 is order-equivalent to the fixed A410 fullfit Reader; every added portfolio member must contribute a distinct order

training_selection_contract.source: the sixteen A413 leave-one-out rank panels, each Reader trained on the other fifteen A401 keys
training_selection_contract.start_rule: candidate with minimum sixteen-key geometric mean true rank, then worst rank, then candidate index
training_selection_contract.greedy_add_rule: add the unused candidate minimizing the geometric mean of the pointwise minimum true rank across the enlarged portfolio; ties by worst pointwise minimum rank then candidate index

fixed_model_contract.fit_source: all sixteen A401 known-key positive cells
fixed_model_contract.model_per_member: the exact A413 representation, distance or location-shape parameters for that frozen candidate

external_transfer_contract.targets: all thirty-two complete A412 W50 fields
external_transfer_contract.learned_portfolio_depth: minimum true-cell rank across the eight fixed learned Readers
external_transfer_contract.matched_baseline_depth: minimum true-cell rank across the eight complete frozen Direct12 view Readers
external_transfer_contract.primary_metric: geometric mean parallel discovery rank across all thirty-two keys
external_transfer_contract.qualification: learned portfolio geometric mean parallel rank is strictly lower than the matched eight-view baseline with positive additional bit gain

production_schedule_contract.ownership: each of 4096 cells belongs to its minimum-rank learned Reader, ties by portfolio position
production_schedule_contract.owner_queue_order: the owning Reader's exact cell order
required_proofs: parallel discovery depth no later than the minimum of the eight source ranks
total work at most eight times the minimum source rank
